name: Form
description: EditForm wrapper with styled validation, field groups, and submit state.

api.name: Form
api.description: EditForm wrapper with styled validation, field groups, and submit state.

examples.title: Input with Validation
examples.code:
<FormField Name="email" Label="Email" Required="true" Error="@_emailError" HelpText="We will never share your email.">
    <Input Type="email" Placeholder="you@example.com" @bind-Value="_emailValue" />
</FormField>
<Button OnClick="ValidateEmail">Validate</Button>

@code {
    private string? _emailValue;
    private string? _emailError;

    private void ValidateEmail()
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_emailValue) || !_emailValue.Contains('@'))
            _emailError = "Please enter a valid email address.";
        else
            _emailError = null;
    }
}

examples.title: Select with Validation
examples.code:
<FormField Name="role" Label="Role" Required="true" Error="@_roleError">
    <Select @bind-Value="_roleValue">
        <SelectTrigger>
            <Text As="span" Class="@(_roleValue == null ? \"text-muted-foreground\" : "")">
                @(_roleValue ?? "Select a role")
            </Text>
        </SelectTrigger>
        <SelectContent>
            <SelectItem Value="admin">Admin</SelectItem>
            <SelectItem Value="editor">Editor</SelectItem>
            <SelectItem Value="viewer">Viewer</SelectItem>
        </SelectContent>
    </Select>
</FormField>
<Button OnClick="ValidateRole">Validate</Button>

@code {
    private string? _roleValue;
    private string? _roleError;

    private void ValidateRole()
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(_roleValue))
            _roleError = "Please select a role.";
        else
            _roleError = null;
    }
}

examples.title: Checkbox and Switch with Validation
examples.code:
<FormField Name="terms" Error="@_termsError">
    <Flex Gap="2" Align="center">
        <Checkbox @bind-Checked="_termsChecked" />
        <Label>I accept the terms and conditions</Label>
    </Flex>
</FormField>
<FormField Name="notifications" Label="Email Notifications" HelpText="Receive updates about your account.">
    <Switch @bind-Checked="_notifChecked" />
</FormField>
<Button OnClick="ValidateTerms">Submit</Button>

@code {
    private bool _termsChecked;
    private bool _notifChecked = true;
    private string? _termsError;

    private void ValidateTerms()
    {
        _termsError = _termsChecked ? null : "You must accept the terms to continue.";
    }
}

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
<FormField Name="username">
    <FormItem>
        <FormLabel>Username</FormLabel>
        <Input Placeholder="Enter your username" />
        <FormDescription>This is your public display name.</FormDescription>
    </FormItem>
</FormField>

mdSummary:
# Form

EditForm wrapper with styled validation, field groups, and submit state.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Form Composition
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/form

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Form | Model | `TModel?` | `` |  |
| Form | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Form | OnValidSubmit | `EventCallback<TModel>` | `` |  |
| Form | OnInvalidSubmit | `EventCallback<TModel>` | `` |  |
| Form | Validator | `IFormValidator?` | `` |  |
| Form | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Form | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| FormDescription | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| FormDescription | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| FormDescription | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| FormField | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| FormField | HelpText | `string?` | `` |  |
| FormField | Error | `string?` | `` |  |
| FormField | Required | `bool` | `` |  |
| FormField | Orientation | `FormFieldOrientation` | `FormFieldOrientation.Vertical` |  |
| FormField | LabelWidth | `string?` | `` |  |
| FormField | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| FormField | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| FormField | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| FormField | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| FormField | ParentFormContext | `FormContext?` | `` |  |
| FormItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| FormItem | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| FormItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| FormLabel | FieldContext | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| FormLabel | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| FormLabel | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| FormLabel | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| FormMessage | FieldContext | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| FormMessage | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| FormMessage | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Form) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (FormDescription) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (FormField) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (FormItem) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (FormLabel) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `OnValidSubmit` (`EventCallback<TModel>`)
- `OnInvalidSubmit` (`EventCallback<TModel>`)

## Sub-components
- `FormDescription`, `FormField`, `FormItem`, `FormLabel`, `FormMessage`

## Cascading values it expects
- `ParentFormContext` (`FormContext?`)
- `FieldContext` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Form />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-destructive`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`
